title: Population-Level Estimation
description: Population-Level Estimation (PLE) computes comparative effectiveness or safety estimates between a target and comparator treatment cohort using OHDSI's CohortMethod R package. Methods include propensity score matching, stratification, and weighting.
tips: PLE requires the HADES R runtime to be active — check System Health if execution fails.
Large covariate sets (1000+ features) improve propensity score balance but increase computation time.
Review the propensity score distribution plot before trusting the HR estimate.
Negative control outcomes help calibrate empirical p-values for systematic error correction.
PLE is compute-intensive — submit during off-peak hours on production systems.
